  narration: 'Did you know a tiny oil drop revealed the universe\'s most fundamental electric charge? Millikan\'s experiment used an atomizer to spray oil droplets between two charged plates. By precisely adjusting the electric field, he could suspend individual drops, balancing gravity with electric force. Observing their movement, he deduced that every charge was a multiple of a single, indivisible unit. This groundbreaking discovery proved electric charge isn\'t continuous but quantized, fundamentally shaping our understanding of matter and energy.',
